command_redacted:
# Initialize git repo and push
cd /opt/data && git init && git remote add origin...

findings.title: GitHub Fine-Grained PAT detected
findings.description: A credential matching a known provider pattern was found in the input. Credentials should not appear in commands or pasted text.

findings.title: File deletion followed by git force-push
findings.description: A file was deleted, then a `git push --force` ran within 60s. Deleting then force-pushing can erase history and overwrite a remote branch.

evidence.detail: A file was deleted, then a `git push --force` ran within 60s. Deleting then force-pushing can erase history and overwrite a remote branch.
